args.task_description:
编写一个Python脚本来尝试访问常见的备份文件和敏感文件，包括：
1. 备份文件：backup.tar.gz, backup.tar, backup.sql, backup.zip, backup.7z, backup.rar
2. 配置文件：config.php, config.inc.php, configuration.php, settings.php
3. 敏感文件：.gitignore, .htaccess, phpinfo.php, info.php, test.php
4. 其他：install.php, upgrade.php, readme.md, CHANGELOG.md
